title: Favorite Smoothie Recipe
excerpt: At home, I have gotten into the habit of a daily smoothie. Sometimes they turn out pink, red, green and even brown. While they don't all appear photogenic, they taste fantastic and most importantly, are very healthy. We use a…
body:
At home, I have gotten into the habit of a daily smoothie. Sometimes they turn out pink, red, green and even brown. While they don't all appear photogenic, they taste fantastic and most importantly, are very healthy. We use a Blendtec WildSide, which we purchased from Costco. Amazon has this Blendtec Total Blender which is slightly cheaper. I am so glad this is one of the appliances we splurged on because it really has been worth every penny. We buy frozen fruits from Costco and Trader Joes, which eliminates the need for ice. Here's my favorite recipe of the moment:

  • a small handful of spinach

  • pineapple and mango (frozen)

  • mixed berries - strawberries, blueberries, raspberries and pomegranate (frozen)

  • shredded carrots

  • Trader Joes Orange Peach Mango juice

So yummy. Sometimes I go greener just by adding more spinach. You really cannot even taste it. Cheers!
